purpose: Machine-readable locale governance fact source for blocker, warning, and deferred surfaces.

dispositions.blocker: Must fail governance verification when missing, drifting, or contradicting the first-batch locale contract.
dispositions.warning: Must stay visible in governance output, but does not block plan execution or local verification.
dispositions.deferred: Tracked as future governance scope and excluded from the first-batch gate.

policy_notes: This manifest is the single fact source for blocker, warning, and deferred governance surfaces.
Only the first-batch `en + zh-CN` commitment and priority workflow/config chain are blockers in Phase 05 Plan 01.
Warning-only surfaces must remain visible in reports, but they do not fail the governance verifier.
Deferred surfaces stay documented so later plans can expand governance without re-deriving scope from prose.
